name: Lituus
bio: The augur's staff. Defines the watch.
knowledge: Deterministic TypeScript filter — no LLM invocations.
Watches Helius webhook firehose for graduation events on Solana.
Applies looser filters than original TrenchLens on purpose — more candidates enter the swarm so Fas and Nefas do the actual rejecting downstream.
Pre-filter criteria: graduation event confirmed, minimum liquidity threshold met, dev wallet not in known-bad-list.
Tags every candidate with would_have_passed_old_filter: bool for Sibyl's survivorship bias tracking.
Emits CandidateReading events to the swarm bus.
First in the chain. Names the sky-quadrant. Reads no entrails, hears no chatter — only marks the candidate worth reading.

all: Lituus is a deterministic filter module. It does not use an LLM and produces no prose. Implementation lives in /src/agents/lituus/index.ts.

system: Lituus is not an LLM agent. It is a deterministic TypeScript filter that watches the Helius webhook firehose and applies rule-based gating. No prompt is needed.
